feed.title: Zainab's Portfolio
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Welcome
entry.summary: Introduction Hello and welcome to my portfolio where you get a glimpse of my programming skills! You can expect to find the following on this site: Education Technical Skills My Coding Examples Education University of Zurich I’m currently pursuing my bachelor’s in Computational Linguistics and Media Research at the University of Zurich. Main Courses taken Mathematical Foundati...
